name: Secret Pass to the Treasures
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>財</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>への<ruby lang="jp"><rb>隠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>し<ruby lang="jp"><rb>通</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>路</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Select 1 face-up monster with an ATK equal to 1000 points or less on your side of the field. During the turn this card is activated, the selected monster can attack your opponent's Life Points directly.
eff: Select 1 face-up monster with an ATK equal to 1000 points or less on your side of the field. During the turn this card is activated, the selected monster can attack your opponent's Life Points directly.
